excluded_sources.reason: Vendor guide used for discovery context only. It includes some dated and secondary claims, so it was not used to support factual claims in the article.

rules: Discovery-only sources may shape the angle and research questions.
Discovery-only sources must not appear in citations.json, claims-ledger.csv, public source links, or draft citation markers.
Material public claims require a cited Grade A or Grade B source, or must be labeled as Sell In Public editorial POV.
